overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a dystopian urban environment (Cyberpunk 2077) showing a character walking through heavy toxic yellow rain and smog. The character moves from beneath an elevated highway overpass through an intersection and along a palm-lined street with industrial buildings.

agents.ego_description: walking under the concrete overpass toward the intersection ahead

notable_agents.action: person crossing the street from right to left in front of the camera

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass structure with thick support pillars
large cylindrical concrete pillar supporting the overpass
tall street lamp with glowing light cutting through the haze
palm tree visible through the yellow toxic haze

segments.scene_description: The segment opens under a massive concrete highway overpass in heavy toxic yellow rain. The camera moves forward toward an intersection, passing a concrete support pillar on the left. A pedestrian crosses from right to left ahead, and street lights glow through the dense atmospheric haze.

events.description: exits the sheltered area under the overpass into the open intersection
bus and sedan drive through the intersection with headlights on

agents.ego_description: moving through the wet intersection toward the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: large bus with headlights on driving through the intersection

entered.detail: extensive metal scaffolding structure covering the building facade
dark colored sedan driving past on the right
large commercial vehicle approaching through the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character moves from under the overpass into the open intersection, fully exposed to the heavy yellow rain. Construction scaffolding dominates the right side while vehicles including a bus and sedan navigate the wet roads. The overpass structure shifts to the left as the camera advances through the crosswalk.

events.description: pedestrian traffic light changes to green walk signal
passing the red Mallagra street sign on the left

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing other pedestrians and street signs

notable_agents.action: child in dark clothing walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: red rectangular street sign with white text reading Mallagra
wooden utility pole with electrical transformers and wires
multi-story building with illuminated signage and balconies

segments.scene_description: Walking along a sidewalk lined with palm trees through the yellow haze. The pedestrian signal turns green as the camera passes the red Mallagra street sign. Commercial buildings with neon signs line the left side while utility poles and wires run along the right. Other pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with dumpsters and trash accumulation

events.description: passing large green dumpsters and trash piles accumulated on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street approaching industrial buildings in the distance

entered.detail: large industrial complex with smokestacks and metal structures visible through the haze
large green industrial dumpster overflowing with garbage
accumulated pile of garbage bags and debris on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues through the rain-soaked street passing industrial dumpsters and trash piles accumulated on the sidewalks. Palm trees continue to line the street while large industrial buildings with smokestacks loom ahead through the yellow toxic haze. The environment feels increasingly industrial and neglected.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the shelter of a concrete overpass into an increasingly industrial urban landscape drenched in toxic yellow rain. It begins beneath a massive highway structure, moving past a concrete support pillar and a crossing pedestrian as street lights glow through the dense atmospheric haze. As the camera advances into the open intersection, the overpass shifts to the left and the view expands to reveal construction scaffolding and vehicles navigating the rain-slicked roads. The scene then transitions onto a sidewalk lined with palm trees and neon commercial signs, passing a red Mallagra street sign as the pedestrian signal turns green. Finally, the path leads past piles of trash and industrial dumpsters, moving toward looming smokestacks and neglected factories that disappear into the thick yellow smog.
